name: UNIQUE THRIFTIQUE & PAWN
description_short: Unique Thriftique & Pawn is a pawn shop located in Stone Mountain, Georgia, offering collateral-based loans and thrift merchandise.
description_long:
Unique Thriftique & Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop in Stone Mountain, Georgia, serving the Gwinnett County area. The business combines pawn lending services with thrift retail operations under a single storefront model. Based on the available directory listing, the company is positioned in the shopping and services category within the Guide to Gwinnett business directory, indicating local market presence and community engagement. The business maintains a physical location at 5385 Five Forks Trickum Rd and operates a local phone line for customer inquiries.

As a pawn shop, the business model centers on providing quick access to cash by accepting personal items as collateral. Customers can pledge items of value in exchange for short-term loans, with the pawn shop retaining the collateral until the loan is repaid with interest. The thrift component of the business suggests they also retail merchandise, likely including unredeemed pawned items, second-hand goods, and inventory typical of combination pawn-thrift operations.

The company's positioning as "Unique" Thriftique & Pawn suggests an emphasis on distinctive inventory and differentiated service in a competitive market. The dual naming structure indicates the business intentionally markets both the lending and retail aspects of the operation. Their inclusion in the Guide to Gwinnett directory and participation in the "Best of Gwinnett" voting program reflects community presence and local reputation building.

Limitations in available information prevent detailed assessment of interest rates, loan terms, inventory quality, customer service ratings, or operational hours. The company's website URL points to a directory listing rather than a dedicated business website, which may indicate limited digital marketing presence. Consumers should directly contact the business to understand specific loan terms, collateral requirements, and pricing before engaging services.
address: 5385-B2 Five Forks Trickum Rd SW, Stone Mountain, GA 30087

company_info.headquarters: 5385-B2 Five Forks Trickum Rd SW, Stone Mountain, GA 30087

pros: Local physical location in Stone Mountain with established community presence
Combination pawn and thrift model offers both lending and retail shopping in one location
Listed in Guide to Gwinnett directory, indicating business legitimacy and local registration
Participates in Best of Gwinnett community voting program, suggesting customer engagement
Phone contact line available (770-417-8611) for direct customer inquiries
cons: No dedicated website or online presence beyond directory listing limits transparency on loan terms and rates
Pawn lending inherently involves high interest rates and risk of losing collateral if loan not repaid
Limited operating hours and accessibility information available to potential customers
No visible customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials in public directory to assess service quality
Generic directory listing provides minimal detail on specific services, inventory, or competitive advantages
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash with collateral to pledge (jewelry, electronics, tools)
Local Stone Mountain and Gwinnett County residents seeking in-person pawn services
Bargain hunters and thrift shoppers interested in second-hand merchandise at lower prices
diagnosis: Unique Thriftique & Pawn is best for Stone Mountain-area residents needing fast cash against personal items and shoppers browsing thrift merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn lending involves losing collateral if the loan isn't repaid, and customers should verify current interest rates and loan terms directly with the business before committing to any transaction.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal collateral
